name: atlas
description: The atlas marketplace: a multi-agent coding architect (atlas) with 22 plainly named skills, 12 core agents, self-improvement hooks, and the atlas-orchestrate methodology (evidence before any done claim), plus an optional organizational deployment plugin (armada) with 11 department agents and 156 department skills.

plugins.name: atlas
plugins.description: Multi-agent coding architect: 22 plainly named skills (the atlas architect skill, atlas-orchestrate engine, atlas-audit code/architecture/self audits, atlas-setup onboarding/install/connectors/repair, atlas-loop recurring work, atlas-ux-test UX swarm, and 16 task skills), 12 core agents, 11 hooks including self-improvement (memory capture, auto-skill, nudge, session ingest) and atlas_doctor (session-health check), and the atlas-orchestrate method: independent verification with runtime evidence before any done claim.

plugins.name: armada
plugins.description: Organizational deployment layer split out of atlas: 11 department agents (data, design, engineering, finance, HR, IT ops, M365, product, productivity, security, support) and 156 department skills carrying org branding, policies, and compliance context. Install alongside atlas only for org use.

plugins.name: programmer
plugins.description: The Pragmatic Programmer (20th Anniversary Edition) as an active codebase auditor and coding-time advisor: 2 skills (tpp-audit runs a 10-dimension codebase review with file:line evidence; tpp-principles surfaces 1-4 relevant book principles while you work), 1 per-dimension auditor agent (tpp-auditor), a UserPromptSubmit nudge hook, and an 89-concept glossary repackaged as reference files for citation.
